markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content, review the article generation process, and plan next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**First Article Approved:** The "Browser Sandboxing" article is approved for publication this week. GrowthX will handle staging in Strapi and will use the selected "speed gauge" cover image.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [**Atlas Demo:** GrowthX demoed its internal Atlas platform, which uses an agentic workflow (research, draft, fact-check) and a "Products & Services" artifact to prevent AI hallucination about Blaxel's capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [**Next Topics Set:** The next batch of articles is confirmed: "Got Sandbox," "Moodle Cost Comparison," "What is Tenant Isolation?," and two other comparison articles.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
  - [**Reporting Access:** GrowthX has PostHog access for traffic tracking and will provide regular AI visibility reports, replacing the need for Blaxel to resubscribe to Profound.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)

## Topics

### First Article Review & Publication

  - [**Feedback:** The "Browser Sandboxing" article was approved. The initial opener, which felt "clickbaity," was improved to better match the article's high quality.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [**Cover Image:** The "speed gauge" design was selected.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX to ensure the Blaxel logo is not cropped by the website's asset format.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [**Publication:** GrowthX will publish the article this week.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [**Process:** Stage content in Strapi → Tag with "guides" → Notify Blaxel via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)

### Atlas: AI Content Generation Process

  - [Aida demoed the internal Atlas platform, detailing its agentic workflow:](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
    1.  [**Assignment Direction:** Manual research defines the article's structure, required topics, and a unique Blaxel angle.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
    2.  [**Research:** An EXA-powered agent finds high-quality sources, including gated reports, and provides links for verification.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
    3.  [**Drafting:** The initial draft is created, followed by manual internal linking and source citation.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
    4.  [**Fact-Checking:** An agent verifies claims against the research. Unverifiable claims are rewritten with cautious language (e.g., "While industry best practices support this claim...") to flag them for human review.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
    5.  [**Blaxel Mention Validation:** A "Products & Services" artifact ensures AI accuracy by preventing it from hallucinating features Blaxel doesn't have.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [**Artifact Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [Blaxel must notify GrowthX (e.g., via Slack, Notion tag) of any product or roadmap changes to keep the "Products & Services" artifact current.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)

### Reporting & Analytics

  - [**AI Visibility:** Blaxel canceled its Profound subscription, expecting GrowthX to provide this data.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
      - [**Solution:** GrowthX will provide regular AI visibility reports. Direct user access to the platform is in development.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [**Website Traffic (PostHog):** GrowthX has access to PostHog (`team@growthxlabs.com`) and will create views to track blog traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)

### Next Article Topics

  - [**Strategy:** The goal is to build topical authority.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=2149.0)
      - [**Method:** Target keywords with a difficulty score under 40.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=2149.0)
      - [**Mix:** Combine high-volume awareness topics with lower-funnel, ICP-relevant comparison articles.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
  - [**Approved Topics:**](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
      - ["Got Sandbox"](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
      - ["Moodle Cost Comparison"](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
      - ["What is Tenant Isolation?"](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [Two other comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
  - [**Rejected Topic:** "Lambda GPU Support" was deprioritized.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Blaxel does not offer GPU support, so the topic wouldn't drive product adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [Publish the "Browser Sandboxing" article this week, ensuring the Blaxel logo is not cropped.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [Draft the five approved articles.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
      - [Create PostHog views for blog traffic tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
      - [Provide regular AI visibility reports.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
      - [Investigate adding status-change permissions for Blaxel in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
  - [**Blaxel:**](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [Notify GrowthX of any product or roadmap updates for the "Products & Services" artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/CCLDs_AoCjs2S2fcXzyXzBxScj65RRTK?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
